final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input [2:0] D,
    input L,
    input U,
    output reg [2:0] out
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (L) begin
            out <= D;
        end else begin
            if (U) begin
                out <= out + 1;
            end else begin
                out <= out - 1;
            end
        end
    end

endmodule
